SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.tool

Class JkExternalToolApi

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.tool.JkExternalToolApi
public final class JkExternalToolApi extends Object
Exported methods to integrate with external tools.

  • Method Details

    • ansiText

      public static String ansiText(String templatedText)
      Converts the given templated text to ANSI escape sequences.
      Parameters:
      templatedText - the input text to be converted to ANSI escape sequences
      Returns:
      the converted text with ANSI escape sequences

    • getBeanName

      public static String getBeanName(String fullyQualifiedClassName)
      Retrieves the bean name for the given fully qualified class name.

    • getCachedBeanClassNames

      public static List<String> getCachedBeanClassNames(Path baseDir)
      Returns the cached bean class names for the given base dir.

    • getDownloadRepos

      public static JkRepoSet getDownloadRepos(Path baseDir)
      Returns download repositories for the specified base directory.

    • isJekaProject

      public static boolean isJekaProject(Path candidate)
      Returns true if the specified path is the root directory of a Jeka project.

    • getImlFile

      public static Path getImlFile(Path moduleDir)
      Retrieves the path of the iml file for the given module directory.

    • getCmdShorthandsProperties

      public static Map<String,String> getCmdShorthandsProperties(Path baseDir)
      Returns the command shorthand properties defined in properties files, from the specified base dir context.

    • getProperties

      public static JkProperties getProperties(Path baseDir)
      Returns the properties defined from the specifies base dir..

    • getGlobalProperties

      public static JkProperties getGlobalProperties()
      Returns the global properties.

    • getDefDependenciesClasspath

      public static List<Path> getDefDependenciesClasspath(Path projectDir)
      Returns the default dependencies classpath for the specified project directory..

    • kbeanNameMatches

      public static boolean kbeanNameMatches(String className, String candidate)
      Checks if the specified className matches the given candidate name.
      Parameters:
      className - The fully qualified class name to compare.
      candidate - The name candidate to match against the class name.
      Returns:
      True if the candidate matches the class name, false otherwise.

    • getKBeanClassnameCacheFile

      public static Path getKBeanClassnameCacheFile(Path baseDir)
      Resolves and retrieves the path to the KBean class name cache file located in the specified base directory.
      Parameters:
      baseDir - the root directory from which the path will be resolved
      Returns:
      the resolved path to the KBean class name cache file

    • getKBeanClasspathCacheFile

      public static Path getKBeanClasspathCacheFile(Path baseDir)
      Resolves the path to the KBean classpath cache file located in the specified base directory.
      Parameters:
      baseDir - the base directory from which the path to the KBean classpath cache file will be resolved
      Returns:
      the resolved path to the KBean classpath cache file

    • availableOptions

      public static List<String[]> availableOptions()
      Retrieves a list of available command-line options for the annotated class. Each option is represented as an array of strings, containing the following information: - The option's longest name. - The option's description. - The type name of the option. - The parameter label of the option.
      Returns:
      a list of string arrays, each representing an available option's details

    • getDefaultAndInitKBeans

      public static JkExternalToolApi.InitKBeans getDefaultAndInitKBeans(Path baseDir)
      Retrieves the default and initialization KBean class names for the specified base directory.
      Parameters:
      baseDir - the base directory from which to read and determine the KBean class names
      Returns:
      an instance of EngineClasspathCache.DefafaulAndInitKBeans containing the default and initialization KBean class names

    • getJdkInfo

      public static JkExternalToolApi.JdkInfo getJdkInfo(Path baseDir)
      Retrieves the JDK information including version, distribution name, and the JDK home directory based on the provided base directory.
      Parameters:
      baseDir - the base directory used to resolve JDK properties and paths
      Returns:
      an instance of JdkInfo containing the resolved JDK information

    • readJdkInfoFromIml

      public static List<JkExternalToolApi.SdkInfo> readJdkInfoFromIml(Path baseDir)
      Returns the jeka jdk names used into generated iml, so that Jeka IDE can add it in its SDK table

    • getChildPaths

      public static List<Path> getChildPaths(Path baseDir)
      Retrieves the child paths based on the given base directory.
      Parameters:
      baseDir - the base directory from which to determine child paths
      Returns:
      a list of paths representing the child paths of the specified base directory

    • getKbeansDeclaredInJekaProperties

      public static List<String> getKbeansDeclaredInJekaProperties(Path baseDir)

    • KbeanNameMatches

      public static boolean KbeanNameMatches(String className, String candidate)
